label: Tokenization, serialization & packing

node.label: Tokenization, serialization & packing
node.definition: Tokenization and serialization convert language, code, images, audio, actions, or records into packed sequences that model runtimes can consume.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Tokenization, serialization & packing is to connect Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units, Information theory to downstream capabilities including Large language models.
examples: combined with Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units, Information theory.
